Playground / Gravity Assist

Preview theme

Gravity Assist

Experiment

An analytic gravitational displacement field. Each vertex finds its target analytically — no springs, no velocity accumulation, just math.

Preview

Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
radiusnumber150Gravitational influence radius in pixels
massnumber18Deformation strength at the cursor
softnessnumber65Smoothing factor for displacement falloff
springnumber0.08Return-to-rest speed (0–1)
colsnumber52Number of grid columns
rowsnumber36Number of grid rows
backgroundstring'var(--neutral-50, #fafafa)'Canvas background color. Accepts hex, rgba, or var(--token) syntax.
lineColorBasestring'var(--neutral-300, #d4d4d8)'Grid line color at rest. Accepts hex, rgba, or var(--token) syntax.
lineColorActivestring'var(--neutral-400, #a1a1aa)'Grid line color under gravitational influence. Accepts hex, rgba, or var(--token) syntax.
lineColorsstring[][]Ordered ring of hex colors for angle-based rainbow. Colors are evenly spaced around 360° from each source.
dotColorstring'var(--effect-gravity-dot)'Vertex dot color. Accepts hex, rgba, or var(--token) syntax.
massColorstringrgba(113,113,122,0.35)Cursor mass indicator color (neutral-500 @ 35%)
staticGridColorstring'var(--effect-gravity-grid)'Faint static background grid color. Accepts hex, rgba, or var(--token) syntax.
sourcesArray<{ x, y, mass? }>[]External gravity sources (prop-based). Each entry warps the grid at that position.
sourcesRefRefObject<Array<{x,y,mass?}> | null>undefinedRef-based source list for zero-rerender updates. Canvas reads on each RAF tick.
invertbooleanfalseWhen true, vertices are repelled away from gravity sources instead of attracted.

Usage

tsx
import { GravityAssist } from '@spaceship/design-system';

// Cursor mode — move mouse over canvas
<div style={{ position: 'relative', height: 480 }}>
  <GravityAssist />
</div>

// Rainbow mode — angle-based brand colors around each gravity source
<div style={{ position: 'relative', height: 480 }}>
  <GravityAssist
    lineColors={[
      '#f9614d',  // Solar Coral 500
      '#f9c600',  // Lumen Yellow 500
      '#26e6b5',  // Nova Mint 500
      '#3c7dff',  // Orbit Blue 500
      '#9b6bff',  // Cosmic Lilac 500
    ]}
  />
</div>

// Push mode — vertices repelled away from the source
<div style={{ position: 'relative', height: 480 }}>
  <GravityAssist invert />
</div>

// Ref-based sources — zero re-renders during interaction
const sourcesRef = useRef(null);
// write sourcesRef.current from a RAF loop, drag handler, etc.
<div style={{ position: 'relative', height: 480 }}>
  <GravityAssist sourcesRef={sourcesRef} lineColors={[...]} />
</div>

Spacetime Curvature

Gravity Assist

An analytic gravitational displacement field. Each vertex finds its target analytically — no springs, no velocity accumulation, just math.

Radius

150px

Mass

18

Softness

65

Spring

0.08
